title: Kuvankaunis
description: A more polished, beautiful, and modern Minecraft experience.
body:
![Kuvankaunis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/369a9eef53e3fe42d27addc2d77c545eb4c91900.png)

Kuvankaunis is a modern modpack focused on visuals and exploration. It's optimized, heavily customizable, and offers a considerable upgrade to the vanilla Minecraft experience.

# Features

## Graphics

The modpack employs Solas Shader by default to provide stunning graphical fidelity, though still maintaining the Minecraft asthetic. It also makes use of Distant Horizons to allow you to appreciate the vastness of your world, while the framerate remains smooth.

![The vastness of a world in Kuvankaunis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19ecfbae15faf6733975b7bf59d156e809384647.jpeg)

## World

The world in Kuvankaunis is vibrant and refreshing, with all three dimesions getting a new coat of paint. Terrain generation is much more complex and interesting, and there are many new materials and wood types to be harvested and used in your builds. It also adds seasons, and each one brings it's own advantages and challenges.

![A Forest in Kuvankaunis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/247c02bc13dcbe2a39016a569931653df32b4442.jpeg)

![The Nether in Kuvankaunis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4b572bdc2d0c3e4e5643bf6749ca86c03cbcdd6.jpeg)

## Quality of Life

There are many Quality of Life features included in Kuvankaunis, such as teleportation waystones, full controller support, container sorting, and character customization, just to name a few.

## Performance

Out of the box, the modpack should perform well on an NVIDIA RTX 4060 or AMD Radeon 7600 XT or better. If you have a less powerful system, you can turn the Solas Shader preset to a lower setting in the Iris menu.

You may also want to allocate 8 GB or more of RAM for the best experience.

For reference, I use an Intel i7-11700F CPU, and an AMD Radeon 9060 XT 16GB GPU and I get between 80-100 Avg. FPS in most situations with the default settings on Fedora Linux 43.

![Performance with Kuvankaunis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/879580d67148865517f3cf4dd0d87c52ff8fcbce.jpeg)

## Controller/Steam Deck Support

Controller support is included out of the box, including for Steam Deck and other handhelds.

## Multiplayer

Kuvankaunis has full multiplayer support, provided you install also it on the server and all clients.

### Need a server to play on?

](https://bisecthosting.com/spacegamedev?r=Kuvankaunis)


## Get help

If you encounter an issue or have a suggestion, you can make a post on our Discord community.
https://discord.gg/tgNjem4bjU

### P.S.

"Kuvankaunis" is the Finnish word for "Picturesque", which I thought was fitting for this modpack :D
